summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase D Finance, Phase C Team, Phase B Clients, and Phase A Dashboard updates completed. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user and session for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase D Finance features (Fee Structure CRUD, Team Salary CRUD, Cash Flow Expense CRUD), Phase C Team (separate Leave Applications and Reimbursements pages), Phase B Clients (Company CRUD with GST/PAN/Business Address), and Phase A Dashboard (Pending Team Requests panel, My Tasks with project/client info, Team Tasks filter) are fully functional.

fee_structure_tab.create_deliverable: PASS - API returns 200, creates with all fields
fee_structure_tab.status_columns: PASS - Deliverable Status, Invoice Status, Payment Status shown

profitability_tab.read_only_table: PASS - Shows Project, Client, Project Value, Received, Pending, Labor Cost, Billable Hours, Profit
profitability_tab.data_derivation: PASS - Calculated from Fee Structure and Labor Costs

cash_flow_tab.income_row: PASS - Shows Expected Income from Fee Structure by month
cash_flow_tab.expenses_editable: PASS - Add Expense button, inline editing, delete works
cash_flow_tab.net_cash_flow: PASS - Shows net with deficit indicator

labor_costs_tab.team_salary_crud: PASS - Add/Update Salary button, table shows Monthly Salary, Hourly Rate, Daily Rate
labor_costs_tab.labor_cost_per_project: PASS - Shows Billable Hours × Hourly Rate breakdown by team member

leave_applications_page.apply_button: PASS - Apply for Leave button opens dialog
leave_applications_page.pending_count: PASS - Shows '9 pending approvals' for managers

reimbursements_page.request_button: PASS - Request Reimbursement button opens dialog
reimbursements_page.pending_count: PASS - Shows '7 pending approvals' with total amount

contacts_tab.create_contact: PASS - New Contact button opens dialog
contacts_tab.gst_pan_address: PASS - GST Number, PAN Number, Business Address fields present
contacts_tab.edit_delete: PASS - Edit/Delete buttons on contact cards

companies_tab.create_company: PASS - New Company button opens dialog
companies_tab.gst_pan_address: PASS - GST Number, PAN Number, Business Address fields in form and displayed on cards
companies_tab.edit_delete: PASS - Edit/Delete buttons on company cards

quick_actions.create_project_dialog: PASS - Opens with full form (name, description, client, budget ₹, dates)
quick_actions.draft_proposal_dialog: PASS - Opens with category, requirement, description, amount
quick_actions.add_task_dialog: PASS - Opens with project selector, title, priority

dashboard_module.pending_team_requests: PASS - Panel shows Leave Applications (9 pending) and Reimbursements (7 pending) for managers
dashboard_module.my_tasks: PASS - Shows tasks with Project Name and Client Name
dashboard_module.team_tasks_filter: PASS - By Status/By Team Member/By Project dropdown (excludes Completed status)
